texto: Healing is about choices—choices to treat or not to treat, tochoose one type of intervention over another, or to choose onemethod of treatment in conjunction with another. One choice does not eliminate all other possibilities.You can choose and choose again. The most importantchoice is the decision to heal; all else follows.
explicacao: Citação de Wanda Buckner sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Healing is about choices—choices to treat or not to treat, tochoose one type of intervention over…” articula reflexao, animals, complementary-medicine em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como complementary-medicine e energy-healing.
